game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Reckless Racing 3 is an isometric arcade racing game where players compete across 36 tracks in 6 environments using one of 28 customizable cars and trucks. Players control their vehicle using customizable on-screen virtual buttons for acceleration, braking, and left/right steering, or by connecting a compatible gamepad. The core gameplay involves navigating muddy tracks, mastering drifts by initiating turns at high speed, and managing vehicle physics to outmaneuver AI opponents across various modes. In Career mode, players progress through 9 cups by winning 60 events, unlocking new vehicles and tracks, while Gymkhana mode challenges players to perform stunts and drifts for points within a time limit. Difficulty scales through increasingly aggressive AI drivers, more complex track layouts, and the need to upgrade vehicle performance (speed, acceleration, grip) using in-game currency earned from race victories.
game_info.description: Race against AI opponents on a muddy isometric track! Master drifting by steering into turns at high speed, manage your vehicle's momentum, and cross the finish line first. Navigate through checkpoints while avoiding track boundaries. Win races to earn points and unlock victory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Up/W: Accelerate
Arrow Down/S: Brake/Reverse
Arrow Left/A: Steer Left
Arrow Right/D: Steer Right
Space: Boost (limited use)
Enter: Start Game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to Menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic racing mechanics including acceleration, steering, and checkpoint progression. Verifies that the vehicle can navigate the track, pass through checkpoints in order, and complete a lap. Ensures physics feel responsive and AI opponents function correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Accelerate continuously using the up arrow, steer through the first few checkpoints, and verify checkpoint counting works. Test turning left and right at moderate speed. Observe AI opponent behavior and ensure they navigate the track independently.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Vehicle should accelerate smoothly, respond to steering inputs, and successfully pass through checkpoints incrementing the counter. AI opponents should navigate the track without getting stuck. Test is successful if the player can complete at least one lap without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by simulating optimal racing performance. Ensures the game correctly detects when the player crosses the finish line after completing all required laps, transitions to the win state, and displays appropriate victory messages.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Accelerate aggressively and navigate the track efficiently, taking optimal racing lines through corners. Use boost strategically on straightaways. Complete all 3 laps as quickly as possible, crossing all checkpoints and the finish line.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state when the player completes 3 laps. Victory screen should display with final time and position. Test is successful if the win condition triggers correctly and the game state updates appropriately.
